creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Building in a poudrier jail:

# poudriere jail -l
JAILNAME             VERSION              ARCH    METHOD  PATH
ia64-11              11.0-CURRENT r262690 ia64    svn+https /pdr/jails/ia64-11

poudriere ports tree at 347176.

Fails with:

libtool: link: c++  -fPIC -DPIC -shared -nostdlib /usr/lib/crti.o /usr/lib/crtbeginS.o  .libs/MEDiterators.o .libs/MEDiteratorsF.o  -Wl,--whole-archive 2.3.6/.libs/libmed23.a 2.3.6/.libs/libmedVV.a ci/.libs/libci.a fi/.libs/libfi.a cfi/.libs/libcfi.a misc/.libs/libmisc.a hdfi/.libs/libhdfi.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so -lz -L/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -L/usr/local/bin -L/usr/local/lib/gcc46/gcc/ia64-portbld-freebsd11.0/4.6.4 -L/usr/local/lib/gcc46/gcc/ia64-portbld-freebsd11.0/4.6.4/../../../../../ia64-portbld-freebsd11.0/lib -L/usr/local/lib/gcc46/gcc/ia64-portbld-freebsd11.0/4.6.4/../../.. -lgfortran -lpthread -L/usr/lib -lstdc++ -lm -lc -lgcc_s /usr/lib/crtendS.o /usr/lib/crtn.o  -O2 -pthread -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46   -pthread -Wl,-soname -Wl,libmed.so.5 -o .libs/libmed.so.5
/usr/local/lib/gcc46/libgfortran.so: could not read symbols: File in wrong format
gmake[4]: *** [libmed.la] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/french/med/work/med-3.0.6/src'
